emails.subject: Enron and Labor Relationships
emails.body: Jeff, per your recent voice mail, below you will find the labor relationship summary that I prepared for Sandy. Hope it is helpful, please call if I can be of any assistance. Rj. Forwarded by Rick Johnson/HR/Corp/Enron on 09/08/2000 11:29 AM Rick Johnson 08/29/2000 07:16 PM
